    TermImpl(Operator op, ImmutableArray<Term> subs, ImmutableArray<QuantifiableVariable> boundVars, JavaBlock javaBlock)
    Constructs a term for the given operator, with the given sub terms, bounded variables and (if applicable) the code block on this term.

    boolean
    ChildTermLabelPolicy.addLabel(TermServices services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Term applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, Term tacletTerm, Operator newTermOp, ImmutableArray<Term> newTermSubs, ImmutableArray<QuantifiableVariable> newTermBoundVars, JavaBlock newTermJavaBlock, Term childTerm, TermLabel label)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JavaBlock
    MergeRuleUtils.getJavaBlockRecursive(Term term)
    Returns the first Java block in the given term that can be found by recursive search, or the empty block if there is no non-empty Java block in the term.
